daily_summary.headline: SpaceX and Blue Origin Lead the Week's Launches

top_events.title: New Glenn | BlueBird Block 2 #2
top_events.description: Blue Origin's New Glenn will launch the BlueBird Block 2 satellite, enhancing broadband capabilities.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-22
top_events.description: SpaceX continues its Starlink deployment with a new batch of satellites.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | GPS III SV10
top_events.description: SpaceX to launch the tenth GPS III satellite, enhancing global navigation.
